history.text: A declaration asserted Pakistan's claim to sovereignty.
Recognised dominion strengthened Pakistan's international status.
Pakistan became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.
Last territory's acquisition changed control of the territory.
Eastern territory withdrawn changed control of the territory.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Pakistan.

worthSeeing.title: K2 Base Camp:
worthSeeing.text: The world's second highest mountain, the savage mountain, in the Karakoram.

worthSeeing.title: Lahore Old City:
worthSeeing.text: Mughal splendour of the Badshahi Mosque, Lahore Fort, and Shalimar Gardens.

worthSeeing.title: Mohenjo-daro:
worthSeeing.text: 5,000-year-old Indus Valley Civilization city, UNESCO World Heritage site.
